main.description: Metadata record for a conviction market project. Stores the project identity, IP classification, and visual assets. One record per market, keyed by communityUri.

communityUri.description: The unique community URI identifying the conviction market.

description.description: Description of what the project is about.

licenseType.description: Default license for the project IP.

loreDescription.description: Extended backstory or lore for the IP.

coverImageUri.description: URI to cover art (IPFS, Arweave, or HTTPS).

creatorRights.description: Default studio rights posture for project IP.

storyStatus.description: Whether the project IP is ready for or already connected to Story Protocol.

storyIpId.description: Optional Story IP Account address or identifier.

storyLicenseTermsId.description: Optional Story PIL terms identifier or URI.

apptokenLaunch.description: How the studio expects to introduce apptokens.

membershipCadence.description: Cadence for recurring producer or patron auctions.

patronSaleModel.description: High-level sales mechanism for early patron receipts and token demand discovery.

patronRewardModel.description: How early patron receipts should be weighted for future bounded allocation or reward eligibility.

finalLaunchTrigger.description: Condition expected before public apptoken liquidity launches.

operationMode.description: How the project expects to operate: solo creator, creator-led studio, or full DAO studio.

fanUpsideModel.description: What early fans receive before any legally reviewed royalty or token launch.

capitalReleaseModel.description: How patron or market capital should unlock as the creator ships work.

patronStreamRecipient.description: Optional wallet or treasury address expected to receive Superfluid patron streams.

patronSuperTokenAddress.description: Optional Superfluid Super Token address used for recurring patron streams.

patronStreamNetwork.description: Network name or chain id for recurring patron streams.

suggestedMonthlySupport.description: Suggested monthly patron support amount, stored as display text until stream execution is wired.

productionStages.description: Optional customized production stage ids for this studio. Clients use the default media-production spine when absent.
